title: croton rzedowskii
intro: Croton rzedowskii, also known as the Mexican croton or Rzedowski's croton, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). It is native to the tropical regions of Central America and Mexico, where it grows as a shrub or small tree. The medicinal properties of Croton rzedowskii include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system, and it is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture.
